section.heading: General

subsection.heading: No bar to engaging in standards activity
subsection.chapeau: Nothing in this subpart shall be construed—

paragraph.content: to prohibit a Federal agency from engaging in activity related to standards-related measures, including any such measure relating to safety, the protection of human, animal, or plant life or health, the environment or consumers; or
to limit the authority of a Federal agency to determine the level it considers appropriate of safety or of protection of human, animal, or plant life or health, the environment or consumers.

subsection.heading: Exclusion
subsection.chapeau: This subpart does not apply to—

paragraph.content: technical specifications prepared by a Federal agency for production or consumption requirements of the agency; or
sanitary or phytosanitary measures under subpart 1.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 96–39, title IV, § 471, as added Pub. L. 103–182, title III, § 351(a), Dec. 8, 1993, 107 Stat. 2120.)
